ORDER EX PARTE ORDER SHORTENING TIME RE: MOTION TO INTERPLEAD FUNDS (MOVING PAPERS FILED/SERVED BY 4PM ON 1/10/13, OPPOSITION BY NOON ON 1/16/13, REPLY WAIVED, HEARING ON 1/18/13 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE PARTIES ARE TRYING TO REACH A SETTLEMENT AND REQUESTED THE COURT FOR A SHORT CONTINUANCE OF THIS HEARING. AT THE REQUEST OF PARTIES, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CROSS COMPLAINANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR INTERPLEADER IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 22, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. CROSS-COMPLAINANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR INTERPLEADER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR, WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY VIA EMAIL TO THE COURT. THE CASE HAS SETTLED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
